# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
function generateAdminReport($filters = []) {
    $pdo = new PDO("mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database", $username, $password);
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);
    
    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['status']) && is_array($filters['status'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($filters['status']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND status IN ($placeholders)";
        $params = array_merge($params, $filters['status']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category']) && is_array($filters['category'])) {
        $placeholders = str_repeat('?,', count($filters['category']) - 1) . '?';
        $sql .= " AND category IN ($placeholders)";
        $params = array_merge($params, $filters['category']);
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND created_at >= ?";
        $params[] = $filters['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND created_at <= ?";
        $params[] = $filters['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND user_id = ?";
        $params[] = $filters['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (title LIKE ? OR description LIKE ?)";
        $searchTerm = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
        $params[] = $searchTerm;
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    $stmt->execute($params);
    
    return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

if ($_POST) {
    $filters = [];
    
    if (!empty($_POST['status'])) {
        $filters['status'] = is_array($_POST['status']) ? $_POST['status'] : [$_POST['status']];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['category'])) {
        $filters['category'] = is_array($_POST['category']) ? $_POST['category'] : [$_POST['category']];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_from'])) {
        $filters['date_from'] = $_POST['date_from'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['date_to'])) {
        $filters['date_to'] = $_POST['date_to'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['user_id'])) {
        $filters['user_id'] = $_POST['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($_POST['search'])) {
        $filters['search'] = $_POST['search'];
    }
    
    $reports = generateAdminReport($filters);
    echo json_encode($reports);
}
?>
